underlying_goal: Create a minimal, clean bootstrap system for fresh Arch Linux installs using ansible, gh, and vault-encrypted PAT, replacing an over-engineered previous setup
friction_detail: Claude repeatedly made wrong architectural decisions (writing vault passwords to plaintext files, using venvs when uv tools was the point, setting global become=true, not configuring git credential helper in bootstrap), requiring the user to correct course multiple times with increasing frustration.
brief_summary: User wanted to radically simplify their Arch Linux bootstrap from 300+ lines to a minimal pacman→ansible→gh flow; achieved after many rounds of Claude making wrong assumptions that the user had to correct.
